title: Simultaneous extraction of RNA, DNA and protein from canine mast cell tumour and skin biopsies
author: Deborah Biasoli
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sq2edye
materials: Homogenise a ~3mm tissue biopsy in 700µl of Qiazol (Qiagen) by shaking (at 30Hz) with 2 x 7mm stainless steel balls in a TissueLyser LT (Qiagen) for 10 min at room temperature.
Proceed with RNA extraction using the miRNeasy Mini Kit (Qiagen), following the manufacturer’s instructions.
Air-dry the DNA pellet for 10 min.

steps.title: Transfer the homogenate to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the homogenate to a 1.5ml tube and add 140µl of chloroform. Shake vigorously for 15s. Allow the homogenate to sit at room temperature for 2 - 3 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12000 x g for 15 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12000 x g for 15 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Carefully transfer the upper aqueous phase...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the upper aqueous phase to a 2ml tube to proceed with RNA extraction. Store the interphase and organic phase at 4°C for subsequent DNA and protein extraction (conveniently performed a day later).

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.21ml of 100% (v/v) ethanol to the interphase and organic phases, and carefully mix by inversion.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 3 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 3 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 2000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 2000 x g for 2 min at 4°C to precipitate DNA.

steps.title: Carefully transfer the phenolic/ethanol supernatant to...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the phenolic/ethanol supernatant to a new tube and store at 4°C for subsequent protein isolation.

steps.title: For DNA isolation , add 0
steps.instruction: For DNA isolation , add 0.7ml of sodium citrate solution to the DNA pellet. Incubate at room temperature for 30 min, and mix by inversion every 5 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 2000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 2000 x g for 2 min at 4°C, and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat steps 10
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 10. and 11. twice.

steps.title: At this stage, the DNA pellet...
steps.instruction: At this stage, the DNA pellet can be stored for up to 3 months in 2ml of 75% (v/v) ethanol at 4°C.

steps.title: To proceed with the DNA isolation, add 1
steps.instruction: To proceed with the DNA isolation, add 1.4 ml of 75% (v/v) ethanol to the DNA pellet.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 20...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 20 min, and mix by inversion every 5 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 2000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 2000 x g for 2 min at 4°C, completely remove the ethanol supernatant and discard it.

steps.title: Resuspend the DNA pellet in 150μl of 8mM NaOH
steps.instruction: Resuspend the DNA pellet in 150μl of 8mM NaOH.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 x g for 10 min at room temperature, and transfer the supernatant to a new tube.

steps.title: To neutralise the DNA sample, add 18μl of 0
steps.instruction: To neutralise the DNA sample, add 18μl of 0.1M HEPES and 1.65μl of 0.1M EDTA.

steps.title: Store DNA samples at -20°C until required
steps.instruction: Store DNA samples at -20°C until required.

steps.title: For protein isolation , add 1
steps.instruction: For protein isolation , add 1.05ml of isopropanol to the phenolic/ethanol phase and mix by inversion for 15 s.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12000 x g for 10 min at 4°C to precipitate protein, and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.4ml of guanidine-ethanol solution to the pellet, and incubate at room temperature for 20 min. The protein pellet can be stored at 4°C for up to a month.

steps.title: To proceed with the protein isolation,...
steps.instruction: To proceed with the protein isolation, centrifuge at 7500 x g for 5 min at room temperature, and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat steps 25
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 25. and 26. twice.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.4ml of 100% (v/v) ethanol to the pellet, vortex, and incubate at room temperature for 20 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 7500 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 7500 x g for 5 min at room temperature, and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Inside a fume hood, add 50μl...
steps.instruction: Inside a fume hood, add 50μl of urea/β-mercaptoethanol solution, and break up the pellet by passing it through a syringe needle.

steps.title: Inside a fume hood, add an...
steps.instruction: Inside a fume hood, add an additional 200μl of urea/2-mercaptoethanol solution, pass through the needle if the protein is not yet completely dissolved, and incubate at room temperature for 1 h.

steps.title: Incubate at 95°C for 3 min,...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 95°C for 3 min, and then on ice for ~5 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12000 x g for 10 min at room temperature. Transfer the protein-containing supernatant to a new tube and store at -20°C until required.
